title: LastTrainSummary
description: Output schema for the last_train skill (CCW-MVP14). Summarises a last_train_report.json produced by last_train_merge.

timeline.description: Ordered list of training steps with their verdict and notes.

step.description: Zero-based step index from the source report.

verdict.description: Classification verdict for this training step.

notes.description: Confidence level and reasons from the underlying verdict object.

combined_zip.description: Path to the combined zip file produced by last_train_merge, or null if not present.

output_format.description: Format used for the written summary file (if write_summary=true).

written_to.description: Absolute path of the written summary file when write_summary=true.
